core_payload.content:
# Sleep-Time Compute

## 1. Role
Sleep-Time Compute is the mature off-peak execution fabric of N1Hub, aligning quiet-time workload routing with wallet posture, workload class, and human rhythm instead of treating off-hours compute as a generic dump queue.

## 2. Off-Peak Contract
The system derives off-peak windows from timezone, profile, and learned rhythm; routes mining, validation, planning, and refinement work through richer workload classes; and measures savings, usefulness, and next-day cognitive benefit as part of scheduling itself.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Invisible progress stays valuable because it remains bounded, economical, and supportive of the person rather than merely busy. Off-peak compute acts as a controlled compounding engine instead of deferred background churn.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Sleep-Time Compute supports To Dig Deep by letting quiet time compound intelligence without stealing the human's wakeful attention.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Sleep-Time Compute defines the off-peak execution fabric that routes background work through quiet windows aligned with human rhythm, wallet posture, and workload class. It covers off-hours scheduling, budget-aware routing, richer workload classes, and coordination between control-plane policy, cheap background compute, and next-day cognitive benefit. The capsule matters because invisible progress becomes harmful when it ignores cost, rhythm, or reviewability. It turns off-peak computation into a bounded compounding engine that supports the person instead of acting like a generic dump queue for unattended work.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped future-meta phrasing so the capsule states present off-peak execution doctrine directly.
